Dialogue: 'Tis crucial to observe the base...

Sleep well, fair eggs...
I, too, feel most at ease when close to wood.
Word has it that you've been busy gardenin'.
Word has it you've been weedin'.
I cannot see a godsdamned thing...
A godsdamned obstruction to my vision...
Quite a handsome design, wouldn't you say?
A handsome design, are they?
Aye, a finer pair of glasses, I've never worn.
Aye, they suit you well.
The fruit this year may be the juiciest yet!
What will the next delivery bring, I wonder?
Phew... I think a quick break is in order.
I could go for a cup of tea...
Oh my! This is quite the lovely color!
Come peruse my porcelain wares! You'll not see anything like them elsewhere!
There we go. Everything should be sorted now.
Welcome, welcome! If it's a bargain you're after, look no further!
We're well stocked for now. Hmm... When's the next delivery?
Why not stop by for a visit? The new tea I bought is simply divine.
Well, if you're inviting, then I'll bring the honey!
I don't recall there being so many stairs when I was a lad...
Curses... They're in the city!?
